'''changupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanolichen|cyanolichen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanolichen|cyanolichen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| changupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængipith|chængipith]] || [[word:chængipij|chængipij]] || [[word:chængipish|chængipish]] || [[word:chængipi|chængipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:changunguputh|changunguputh]] || [[word:changungupuj|changungupuj]] || [[word:changungupush|changungupush]] || [[word:changungupu|changungupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:changuputh|changuputh]] || [[word:changupuj|changupuj]] || [[word:changupush|changupush]] || [[word:changupu|changupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:changufpufth|changufpufth]] || [[word:changufpufj|changufpufj]] || [[word:changufpufsh|changufpufsh]] || [[word:changufpuf|changufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changuputhu|changuputhu]] || [[word:changupuju|changupuju]] || [[word:changupushu|changupushu]] || [[word:changupuku|changupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changuputh|changuputh]] || [[word:changupuj|changupuj]] || [[word:changupush|changupush]] || [[word:changupu|changupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changuputhul|changuputhul]] || [[word:changupujul|changupujul]] || [[word:changupushul|changupushul]] || [[word:changupukul|changupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changupuuthuthu|changupuuthuthu]] || [[word:changupuujuju|changupuujuju]] || [[word:changupuushushu|changupuushushu]] || [[word:changupuuku|changupuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changuputhun|changuputhun]] || [[word:changupujun|changupujun]] || [[word:changupushun|changupushun]] || [[word:changupukun|changupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changuputhuoro|changuputhuoro]] || [[word:changupujuoro|changupujuoro]] || [[word:changupushuoro|changupushuoro]] || [[word:changupukuoro|changupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
